element_introduction_order.mastery_context: 13-step character creation process with preset options available; foundational to all gameplay
Right-click radial menus with color-coded action types; skill selection via menu system (Sleight of Hand, Intimidate, Gather Information)
Dialog skills appear as options in conversations with skill icons; NPCs and bartering mechanics introduced
Initiative-based turn order; five action types (free, no, full-round, move, standard); action economy management
Special attacks, spell casting, defensive positioning, non-lethal damage, trip attacks, coup de grace
0 HP = staggered; −1 to −9 HP = unconscious with 10% stabilization chance; −10 HP = death
Up to three NPC followers; familiars and animal companions based on class; alignment restrictions for party cohesion
Exploration of marshes, chapel ruins, and evil strongholds; spatial progression from Hommlet outward to Nulb
Progressive threat escalation from common bandits to organized evil forces
Elemental faction encounters; high-level combat requiring mastery of all prior systems

typical_relief_triggers: Non-combat skill application (Sleight of Hand, Intimidate)
typical_tension_triggers: Character reduced to staggered state (0 HP)
Encounter with organized evil faction forces
Ambush encounters in marshes near Nulb
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Turn-based tactical pacing allows player-controlled tempo; tension builds through encounter design and action economy constraints; relief provided by town hubs and dialogue breaks

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduction to character creation and interface mechanics; low-threat exploration of Hommlet area; basic combat encounters with bandits and kobolds
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Progression from town into marshes and outlying settlements (Nulb); increasing enemy organization and difficulty; tactical combat becomes more complex
difficulty_curve.late_game: Elemental Evil Temple and faction-specific encounters; high-level combat requiring mastery of party composition, action economy, and spell strategy
notable_spikes: First organized evil encounter transition from scattered bandits
Chapel encounter introducing multi-enemy tactical coordination
Temple faction encounters with elemental combat abilities

notable_level_patterns.description: Hommlet serves as safe town hub with NPC interaction, bartering, and party management; linear exploration outward through marshes to Nulb creates directional progression
Encounters designed around turn-based action economy; party positioning and initiative order create tactical layer; multiple enemy types coordinate against players
Evil forces organized by faction (bandits, kobolds, goblins, elemental cults); encounter difficulty scales with proximity to Temple and faction sophistication
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Progression from Hommlet outskirts to Temple of Elemental Evil
